data.name: MSYNC001_Title
data.value: Missing column type attribute

data.name: MSYNC001_MessageFormat
data.value: Property '{0}' is missing a column type attribute (e.g. MySqlColumnTypeAttribute, SqlServerColumnTypeAttribute)

data.name: MSYNC001_Description
data.value: All public properties on a model class decorated with a table name attribute must have a column type attribute so ModelSync can generate correct SQL.

data.name: MSYNC002_Title
data.value: Missing table name attribute

data.name: MSYNC002_MessageFormat
data.value: Class '{0}' has column type attributes but is missing a table name attribute (e.g. MySqlTableNameAttribute)

data.name: MSYNC002_Description
data.value: Classes whose properties carry column type attributes should also have a table name attribute so ModelSync can generate correct SQL.

data.name: MSYNC003_Title
data.value: Missing primary key attribute

data.name: MSYNC003_MessageFormat
data.value: Model class '{0}' has no property decorated with a primary key attribute

data.name: MSYNC003_Description
data.value: Every database table model should designate at least one property as a primary key.

data.name: MSYNC004_Title
data.value: Ignored property has mapping attributes

data.name: MSYNC004_MessageFormat
data.value: Property '{0}' uses DbIgnore together with database mapping attributes

data.name: MSYNC004_Description
data.value: An ignored property must not also define database mapping metadata.

data.name: MSYNC005_Title
data.value: Invalid database column name

data.name: MSYNC005_MessageFormat
data.value: Property '{0}' has invalid database column name '{1}'

data.name: MSYNC005_Description
data.value: Explicit column names must use the safe ModelSync identifier format.

data.name: MSYNC006_Title
data.value: Conflicting generated-value attributes

data.name: MSYNC006_MessageFormat
data.value: Property '{0}' has more than one default or generated-value attribute

data.name: MSYNC006_Description
data.value: A property must have one unambiguous database-generated default definition.

data.name: MSYNC007_Title
data.value: Generated value is not supported for this property type

data.name: MSYNC007_MessageFormat
data.value: Property '{0}' enables auto-increment on unsupported type '{1}'

data.name: MSYNC007_Description
data.value: Auto-increment primary keys must use an integral CLR type.

data.name: MSYNC008_Title
data.value: Multiple provider primary-key attributes

data.name: MSYNC008_MessageFormat
data.value: Property '{0}' has multiple provider primary-key attributes

data.name: MSYNC008_Description
data.value: A property must use one provider-specific primary-key mapping.

data.name: Attr_InvalidLength
data.value: Invalid length for {0}. Must be a number <= 65535 or 'MAX'.

data.name: Attr_LengthNotSupported
data.value: Length is not supported for {0}.
